title: TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Released on the official website - tnresults.nic.in on 08-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Tamil Nadu Plus One Arrears result.

content.text: The Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu, has officially released the TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 for Class 11 students who appeared in the arrear examinations for the 2025-26 academic session. The results have been made available online for various streams of HSE +1, and candidates can now access their provisional marksheets through the state result portals. TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - dge.tn.gov.in.

Students can check and download their TN 11th arrears result by visiting tnresults.nic.in, entering their registration number and date of birth, and then saving the provisional marksheet for reference.

After downloading the result, students are advised to carefully verify personal details, subject-wise marks, and result status, and contact the concerned school or DGE Tamil Nadu in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 has been released for Class 11 students who appeared in the supplementary/arrear exams conducted by the Directorate of Government Examinations, Tamil Nadu. Students can now check their Tamil Nadu 11th arrears result online at tnresults.nic.in and dge.tn.gov.in by using their registration number and date of birth to download the provisional marksheet.

rows: Directorate of Government Examinations, Tamil Nadu (DGE TN)
Registration number and date of birth

sections.heading: TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The DGE Tamil Nadu has activated the TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 direct link on the official result portals so that students can quickly access their Class 11 arrear marks online. By using the direct result link, candidates can view or download their TN 11th arrears result instantly without any confusion, simply by entering their registration number and date of birth on the result login page.

sections.heading: How to Check TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow the steps below to check TN HSE +1 Arrears Result 2026 online in a simple and error-free manner.

items: Visit the official Tamil Nadu result portal tnresults.nic.in or go to dge.tn.gov.in and navigate to the results section.
On the homepage, click on the link that reads "HSE(+1) Arrears Examination Results 2026" or similar.
On the result login page, enter your registration number in the given field exactly as per your hall ticket.
Enter your date of birth in the prescribed format (DD/MM/YYYY).
Click on the "Submit" or "Get Marks" button to proceed.
Your TN HSE +1 arrears result 2026 provisional marksheet will be displayed on the screen with subject-wise marks and result status.
Download the marksheet and take a printout for future reference and admission or re-appearing requirements.
